title: cephalomanes clathratum
intro: Cephalomanes clathratum, also known as the lattice-leaved rock cap, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its leaves and rhizomes containing compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Consuming the plant has been associated with various health benefits, including the reduction of oxidative stress, improvement of cardiovascular health, and potential anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal compounds, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
